description_long: This butcher shop is a two-story building with a steeply pitched, reddish-brown tiled roof and pale blue exterior walls. The front facade features a prominent overhang supported by decorative columns, a large open entrance, and a shuttered window above, with a bold 'LA' graffiti-style logo painted on the wall. The side walls are plain, with a few small rectangular windows and a simple arched passageway on one side. The structure appears to be made primarily of masonry or concrete, with wooden or metal window shutters and roof tiles. The overall design is utilitarian with some decorative flourishes, suggesting a blend of traditional and slightly modernized urban architecture. No interior details or products are visible from the exterior.
description: A pale blue, two-story butcher shop with a red tiled roof, decorative front columns, and a large open entrance beneath a shuttered window and graffiti logo.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, decorative columns, shuttered window, and 'LA' graffiti logo.
description_view_1: Side view reveals plain blue walls, three small windows, and an arched passageway.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a featureless blue wall and the continuation of the red tiled roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows a single small window and another arched passageway, with minimal decoration.
attribute_shop_signage: A large, black 'LA' graffiti-style logo is painted on the upper left of the front facade, with a smaller script beneath it. No other signage, text, or symbols are visible.
